multiplicity_method: Holm within the four registered components for this task
criterion: local retains at least 60% of the BPTT-axis gain; one-sided seed-level p-value must pass Holm familywise correction at alpha=0.05
note: 95% whole-seed bootstrap; mean effects use a paired sign-flip test and the median cosine uses an exact sign test. Support additionally requires the complete 30-seed, 12-cell formal grid and a valid functional state-displacement budget plus an identifiable non-collapsed belief gate and the explicit paired/frozen/leakage/local-rule mechanism audit.

multiplicity_method: Holm within the four registered components for this task
criterion: local gain over frozen is at least 0.03; one-sided seed-level p-value must pass Holm familywise correction at alpha=0.05
note: 95% whole-seed bootstrap; mean effects use a paired sign-flip test and the median cosine uses an exact sign test. Support additionally requires the complete 30-seed, 12-cell formal grid and a valid functional state-displacement budget plus an identifiable non-collapsed belief gate and the explicit paired/frozen/leakage/local-rule mechanism audit.

multiplicity_method: Holm within the four registered components for this task
criterion: local gain over random update is at least 0.03; one-sided seed-level p-value must pass Holm familywise correction at alpha=0.05
note: 95% whole-seed bootstrap; mean effects use a paired sign-flip test and the median cosine uses an exact sign test. Support additionally requires the complete 30-seed, 12-cell formal grid and a valid functional state-displacement budget plus an identifiable non-collapsed belief gate and the explicit paired/frozen/leakage/local-rule mechanism audit.

comparison: all four Exp23 registered local-controller criteria
multiplicity_method: intersection-union AND over four Holm-corrected components
criterion: all four Holm-corrected component conclusions must support (intersection-union AND)
note: No OR criterion is used. All non-frozen conditions must pass the matched functional budget, and the learned belief gate must pass its preregistered identifiability/strength gate. Every seed must also pass the explicit pairing, recurrent hash/copy, split-leakage, and local no-autograd/BPTT audit. The joint alternative is an intersection: requiring every Holm-corrected component to support is a conservative IUT.

comparison: local update cosine with exact forward sensitivity
multiplicity_method: Holm within the four registered components for this task
criterion: median local/exact update cosine is strictly positive; one-sided seed-level p-value must pass Holm familywise correction at alpha=0.05
note: 95% whole-seed bootstrap; mean effects use a paired sign-flip test and the median cosine uses an exact sign test. Support additionally requires the complete 30-seed, 12-cell formal grid and a valid functional state-displacement budget plus an identifiable non-collapsed belief gate and the explicit paired/frozen/leakage/local-rule mechanism audit.

comparison: current and delayed task joint claims
multiplicity_method: intersection-union AND over two task-specific Holm families
criterion: both task-specific Holm-corrected IUT claims must support (AND)
note: If local-eprop fails to beat random update, the registered population-gain-axis local-learning route is opposed for that task. Combining the two task claims is itself an intersection-union test.
